name: SWW YAPTOM Save Upgrade Tools v2 Copy Spotlight
base: Save Upgrade Tools v2: V2 01 Editorial Rule

sourceIcon.note: Crop is from the upper-right green checked-box in the supplied sheet; the icon is not redrawn.

concepts.title: Proof Card
concepts.idea: Turns the Smarter Way Wealth sentence into a bordered proof card directly under the headline, so the copy reads as a central promise instead of a footer note.

concepts.title: Callout Band
concepts.idea: Uses a crisp high-contrast band to interrupt the front and give the founder proof sentence more mailbox-level stopping power.

concepts.title: Advisor Frame
concepts.idea: Frames the copy and David's name as a signature-style advisor panel beside the chart, giving the human fiduciary message its own visual territory.
